displayTitle: Knights of the Old Republic #17: Nights of Anger, Part 2
synopsis: Keeper of a terrible secret, addled inventor Camper spent most of his life running from Adascorp, the most powerful organization on his homeworld of Arkania. Now he lies gravely ill aboard the Arkanian Legacy, the colossal flagship of the corporation, his life in the hands of its owner—Lord Adasca! Does the young lord really intend to cure Camper and make amends for his predecessors' relentless hunt of the old man? title: Knights of the Old Republic #17: Nights of Anger, Part 2
